name: cp-nice-player
description: Stream audio files inside VS Code with chunked, low-latency playback powered by FFmpeg and Web Audio.

cp-nice-player.ffmpegPath.description: Optional path to the ffmpeg executable. Leave empty to use ffmpeg from PATH. FFmpeg is required for playback.

enumDescriptions: Ogg Vorbis (default); use playback.oggQuality to tune quality.
cp-nice-player.playback.format.description: Output format for FFmpeg transcode before playback.

cp-nice-player.playback.oggQuality.description: libvorbis quality (FFmpeg -q:a) when playback.format is ogg. Higher values mean better quality and larger files.

cp-nice-player.playback.chunkDurationSec.description: Duration of each streamed audio chunk in seconds.

cp-nice-player.playback.chunkBufferCount.description: Number of chunks to buffer from the playhead, including the current chunk.

cp-nice-player.playback.fetchConcurrency.description: Maximum number of chunk downloads in parallel. 1 fetches sequentially from low to high index.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
